library.name: JSZip
library.description: JavaScript library used to generate browser-side ZIP exports.
library.customised: Retained as a Moodle AMD-compatible source file. Dynamic Function usage is present in the upstream distribution and is documented in the source header.

library.name: pako
library.description: DEFLATE implementation bundled inside the JSZip browser distribution.
library.customised: Bundled transitively inside JSZip 3.10.1; not maintained as a separate Moodle AMD module.

library.name: localForage
library.description: Offline browser storage library used to persist writing process revisions in IndexedDB with browser fallbacks.
library.customised: Retained as a single Moodle AMD-compatible source file.

library.name: lie
library.description: Promise implementation bundled inside the localForage browser distribution.
library.customised: Bundled transitively inside localForage 1.10.0; not maintained as a separate Moodle AMD module.

library.name: immediate
library.description: Asynchronous task scheduling helper bundled through lie inside the localForage browser distribution.
library.customised: Bundled transitively inside localForage 1.10.0 through lie 3.1.1; not maintained as a separate Moodle AMD module.

library.name: diff-match-patch
library.description: Text diff, match, and patch library used to create compact writing revision patches.
library.customised: Retained as a Moodle AMD-compatible source file with a named ES module export for DiffMatchPatch.
